get.description: Returns the caller's flattened permission set for the chapter identified by the `x-chapter-id` header. Clients use this to render permission-aware UI without duplicating RBAC rules or issuing one request per role.
get.summary: Get effective permissions for the active chapter

post.summary: Get signed upload URL for profile photo
Generate signed upload URL for chapter logo
Confirm logo upload and update chapter
Redeem an invite token to join a chapter

get.summary: List in-app notifications for current user
Download .ics calendar file for an event

patch.summary: Update attendance status for a member

post.summary: Trigger auto-absent marking for an event

get.description: Backs the Points admin Audit tab. Filter by user, category, flagged state; paginate via a cursor (`before` ISO8601). Returns newest-first, capped at `limit` (default 50, max 200).

parameters.name: flagged
parameters.description: Only return transactions that were flagged by the anomaly threshold (`metadata.flagged === true`). Accepts 'true' or 'false'.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: ISO8601 cursor — return transactions created before this timestamp

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max transactions to return (1-200, defaults to 50)

get.summary: Get point summary for a member

post.summary: Confirm upload and store resource metadata

get.summary: Get resource detail with download URL

post.summary: Get or create a 1-on-1 DM channel

get.summary: Get pinned messages in a channel

post.summary: Generate a signed upload URL for a chat file attachment

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Filter by user (admins with service:approve only)

get.summary: List service entries (own or all for admins)

delete.summary: Delete a PENDING service entry (own or any for admins)

patch.summary: Approve or reject a service entry

get.summary: List tasks (own or all for admins)

post.summary: Confirm task completion and award points
Create a poll in a channel

get.description: Chapter-wide poll list. Supports channel filter, active=true|false filter, and limit. Each entry includes aggregate results plus the caller's own selections.

parameters.name: channel_id
parameters.description: Scope results to a single channel.

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: Accepts 'true' or 'false'. `true` returns only polls that haven't expired; `false` returns only expired polls.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max polls to return (1-200, defaults to 50).

info.title: Frapp API
info.description: The Operating System for Greek Life

permissions.description: Caller's effective permission set for the active chapter. Contains the wildcard `*` for Presidents. Empty array means no active roles.

filename.description: Original filename for the avatar image

role.description: Role name to assign to invited member

is_enabled.description: Whether notifications for this category are enabled

success_url.description: URL to redirect on successful payment

cancel_url.description: URL to redirect on canceled payment

return_url.description: URL to redirect when leaving the portal

file_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the uploaded file

proof_path.description: Storage path to proof file (e.g. from upload)

review_comment.description: Optional comment for the member (especially on rejection)

option_indexes.description: Option index(es) to vote for. Single choice: [0]. Multi choice: [0, 1].

user_id.description: Filter by user ID (omit for chapter-wide)
Filter by user ID (omit for chapter-wide)
